scriptPreview: Hey {name} — loved your recent series on minimal routines. We’re launching a derm-tested serum and think your audience would resonate with a 7-day challenge format…
Quick note: your coaching clarity is rare. We built recovery tools for athletes — would love to send a kit, no strings, and hear if it fits your stack…
Your deep dives on {topic} consistently outperform category benchmarks. We have a compact sponsor read that matches your pacing — happy to share a sample…
Saw your thread on {topic}. We’re piloting a tool for portfolio tracking — would value a 15m call if you’re exploring new sponsor categories this quarter…
Your plating tutorials are addictive. We source small-batch olive oil — thought a ‘blind taste’ episode could be fun for your audience…
Your aesthetic is exactly what we had in mind for our spring line. Open to a gifted drop + optional paid reel if it feels authentic…
Open on a messy counter POV, cut to timer at 0:60, reveal product wipe-down. CTA: “link in bio for the checklist we give creators.”

hook: POV: your hands after one week on this routine
scriptPreview: Carousel: day 1 dryness → day 7 calm skin. Voiceover keeps under 15 words per slide. End with gentle product mention + save for later.

hook: POV: spotless sinks without the chemical smell
scriptPreview: 60s mid-roll: split screen old cleaner vs ours, highlight fume-free claim, demo single pump. Close with subscribe + pinned comment link.

hook: Laundry hack: cold water + enzyme booster
scriptPreview: Before/after stain clip, on-screen text for dosage, myth-bust ‘hot only’ in one line. Tagline: fewer rewashes, same bright whites.

hook: Meal prep Sunday in under 20 minutes
scriptPreview: Reel beat sheet: fridge wide shot → three containers → final plated meal. Use on-screen timer; soft CTA to shopping list.

hook: Why your cutting board might be the problem
scriptPreview: Problem/solution arc under 90s: show grooves holding moisture, swap to care routine, link to care PDF in description.

hook: Glass vs plastic: what we learned
scriptPreview: Quick hits: stain test, microwave clip, price-per-use math on screen. Keep tone journalistic, not preachy.

hook: Refill station tour: zero plastic routine
scriptPreview: Story sequence: tote → dispensers → refill price reveal. Poll sticker: ‘Would you try refills?’ to boost engagement.

hook: One sheet = fewer loads, lower footprint
scriptPreview: Split laundry piles, count sheets on screen, tie to CO₂e estimate disclaimer. Finish with ‘dose correctly’ reminder.

hook: Three products, same glow — here’s the order
scriptPreview: Talking head + bathroom mirror: order of operations, wait times, SPF finish. Chapters for skim viewers.
